sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Other Hydrographic Features layer record for gaz_id 234522, "Putah Creek", CA, Yolo Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":234522,"gaz_name":"Putah Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Lake","state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Yolo"} — geometry point converts to lon -121.7602, lat 38.5301 (confirmed against Wikipedia's infobox, which cites the same GNIS ID 234522), correcting the file's prior coordinate (-122.0894, 38.5018) which sat ~15km west near Monticello Dam/Lake Berryessa and was not sourced from GNIS.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(115) — Putah Creek (Solano and Yolo Cos.)
sources.quotedText: (115) Putah Creek (Solano and Yolo Cos.) from Solano Lake to Monticello Dam. All year. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (CDFW booklet)
Interdam Putah Creek — Putah Creek Trout
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

regulations.humanSummary: Open to fishing all year from Lake Solano upstream to Monticello Dam
regulations.verbatimText: from Solano Lake to Monticello Dam. All year.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used on this reach
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Zero trout may be retained; all trout caught must be released unharmed.

regulations.humanSummary: Zero trout bag limit — this reach is catch-and-release only for trout

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
